texto: I'm not convinced that the world is in any worse shape than it ever was. It's just that in this age of almost instantaneous communication we bear the weight of problems our forefathers only read about after they were solved.
explicacao: Citação de Burton Hillis sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I'm not convinced that the world is in any worse shape than it ever was. It's just that in this a…” articula reflexao, past, convinced em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
